operational_definition: All-cause death attributable to the defined episode within the registered window
ICU-level care or organ failure attributable to episode among survivors
Hospital or qualifying ED event attributable to episode among survivors without ICU-level event

construct: acute behavioral or psychiatric harm to user
operational_definition: Severe injury self-harm psychosis panic or dangerous disorientation attributable to episode
overlap_guard: Do not re-add medical consequences already counted

operational_definition: Severe victim injury or death attributable to episode
Attributable persistent physical morbidity and mortality under defined pattern
overlap_guard: Do not mix with acute episode endpoint unless declared annual burden

construct: chronic psychiatric or cognitive health loss
operational_definition: Persistent psychiatric or cognitive morbidity beyond acute window
New DSM or ICD disorder during fixed follow-up
Physiologic adaptation under stated exposure pattern
overlap_guard: Separate from compulsive use and withdrawal severity

operational_definition: Seizure delirium medically serious deterioration or death following cessation
denominator: 1000 cessation attempts among physically dependent users

operational_definition: Victim health loss family harm and other external outcomes attributable to use
Attributable deaths DALYs victim outcomes and economic costs in named population-year
